ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group */,
  "eligible_rate" REAL /* Rate of eligibility for participation in panels */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the ethnic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the ethnic group */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the ethnic group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "panel_data" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each panel record */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic group participating in the panel */,
  "panel_rate" REAL /* Rate of actual participation in the panels */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between eligible rate and panel rate */,
  "absolute_difference" REAL /* Absolute difference in participation */,
  "panel_name" TEXT /* Name of the panel */,
  "panel_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the panel */,
  "panel_size" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the panel */,
  "panel_date" TEXT /* Date when the panel took place */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to determine eligibility for the panel */,
  "eligibility_source" TEXT /* Source of the eligibility data */,
  "participation_source" TEXT /* Source of the participation data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_data_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., eligibility, participation, impact of initiatives) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User or system that generated the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User or system that approved the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or findings from the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
